name: Cedar Woods Properties Limited
analysis: CWP's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.8900, stop A$6.4944, target A$7.5800 (1.74:1) — then trail it.
